title: Indian Coal Remains Longest Running Headwind In Dry Bulk Market This Year
section_path: Indian Coal Remains Longest Running Headwind In Dry Bulk Market This Year
section_path_text: Indian Coal Remains Longest Running Headwind In Dry Bulk Market This Year
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed at length in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, weakness in India's coal-derived electricity generation and demand for coal imports has remained the longest sustained headwind in the dry bulk market this year. New more recently, though, is that India's coal-derived electricity generation has managed to experience its largest year-on-year contraction since 2020. Overall, the situation in India continues to worsen.
